technology.title: Our Technology
technology.desc: Innovative and intelligent systems to elevate your supply chain management efficiency.
technology.vmiDesc: Koch Packaging and Packing Services utilizes a Packaging Supply Management System (VMI) to effectively manage orders.
technology.vmi1Text: Customers can directly upload production part plans into the system.
technology.vmi2Text: The system automatically matches parts with required packaging (Matching BOM).
technology.vmi3Text: Automated Purchase Order issuance (PO Issued auto) and system approvals ensure speed and accuracy.
technology.vmi4Text: Track status via daily/weekly summary reports and Just-in-Time delivery reports.
technology.wmsDesc: For warehousing, Koch Packaging and Packing Services provides a comprehensive management system covering all processes.
technology.wms1Text: Manages goods receipt, space sorting, and storage.
technology.wms2Text: Manages order picking and marshalling for maximum efficiency before delivery.
technology.tmsDesc: Koch Packaging and Packing Services developed an in-house TMS (Transportation Management System) to meet customer needs.
technology.tms1Text: Track transport vehicles and locations via GPS on a map in real-time.
technology.tms2Text: Uses Geofencing alerts when vehicles enter/exit areas and QR Codes for fast and accurate status updates.
technology.moqDesc: Koch Packaging and Packing Services's software and VMI system help customers avoid large inventory stocks:
technology.moq1Text: The system supports a minimum order quantity of 1 piece, eliminating the need to overstock.
technology.moq2Text: Supports daily deliveries, allowing multiple items to be combined in a single shipment.
technology.moq3Text: Reduces stock holding costs by 55-75% and ordering workload by up to 31%.
technology.moq4Text: Prevents shortage problems and increases delivery accuracy up to 99%.
technology.vmiCardDesc: Intelligent order management system to boost ordering efficiency and Just-in-Time delivery.
technology.wmsCardDesc: End-to-end warehouse management from goods receipt, sorting, and storage through to delivery.
technology.tmsCardDesc: In-house developed transportation system with real-time GPS vehicle tracking.
technology.moqCardDesc: Supports minimum order quantity of 1 piece, reducing stock holding costs by up to 55-75%.

branches.title: Our Factory Branches
branches.desc: Elevating production standards and world-class warehouse management systems to meet customer demands.
branches.banbuengDesc: The main production base for corrugated packaging (Carton Box) with over 120 expert staff, ready to support large-scale production volumes.
branches.banbueng3Text: Quality control follows industrial standards at every step.
branches.bowinDesc: A new branch designed to support expansion in the Bowin Industrial Estate, focusing on warehouse services and VMI management to be closer to customer factories.
branches.bowin3Text: Implements Warehouse Management System (WMS) and VMI for speed and accuracy.

partners.title: Partners
partners.desc: Continuously trusted by partners in the automotive industry, including OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers nationwide. We act as more than just a packaging provider; we are a Strategic Partner collaborating to develop Packaging, VMI, Warehouse, and Logistics solutions to maximize your operational efficiency. Our expertise ranges from designing protective packaging and systematic warehousing to comprehensive transportation. Every process is tailored for precision, speed, and on-time delivery. Ready to grow and build sustainable success together in the long term.
partners.desc_p1: Continuously trusted by partners and customers in the automotive industry and related sectors, including OEM manufacturers and Tier 1 suppliers nationwide.
partners.desc_p2: We do more than just provide packaging — we serve as a "solution development partner" in Packaging, VMI, Warehouse, and Logistics to support our clients' operations at peak efficiency.
partners.desc_p3: Our collaboration covers everything from packaging design suited to each part, to comprehensive warehouse and transportation management — every process engineered for precision, speed, and on-time delivery.
partners.cta: We are ready to grow alongside our partners and build sustainable success together for the long term.

company.title: Company Information
company.subtitle: Get to Know Koch Packaging and Packing Services
company.p1_strong: Koch Packaging and Packing Services Co., Ltd.
company.p1: Specializes in comprehensive packaging and supply chain solutions — from design, material sourcing, and production through to warehouse and logistics management.
company.p2: Starting from manufacturing corrugated and solid fiberboard packaging, the company has grown to cover Packaging VMI System, Warehouse Management, and Transportation Services tailored for the automotive and electronics industries.
company.p3: Driven by a commitment to continuous improvement, we apply automation technology and data management to deliver accurate, fast, and high-standard services — ready to support business growth both domestically and internationally.

expertise.title: Our Expertise
expertise.subtitle: Specialized Expertise
expertise.desc_strong: "Elevating supply chain management to the future with professional expertise."
expertise.desc_p: Koch Packaging and Packing Services is committed to creating a "Smart, Fast, and Sustainable" Supply Chain system for the automotive industry in Thailand. We are ready to be a strategic partner to help you fully manage logistics and VMI systems with the most advanced engineering and digital technology solutions.
expertise.item1_desc: Expertise in designing and developing packaging for the automotive industry, covering a wide range of materials such as paper, steel, wood, and plastic.
expertise.item2_desc: Developing VMI systems to help customers efficiently manage packaging stock. Linking production, purchasing, and delivery data automatically to reduce costs and excess inventory.
expertise.item3_desc: Providing warehouse management services in the Ban Bueng and Bo Win areas, supporting both packaging and industrial warehousing. Able to store, control, and distribute goods systematically.
expertise.item4_desc: Providing transportation services with the company's own fleet, along with an in-house developed Transportation Management System (TMS) to track transportation status in real-time.

vision.title: Vision and Mission
vision.subtitle: Vision
vision.p1: Koch Packaging and Packing Services Co., Ltd. is committed to becoming a leader in Supply Chain Services for the automotive industry by developing solutions that are Smart, Fast, and Sustainable, supporting customer growth in every dimension of the supply chain.
vision.p2: The company aims to systematically link Packaging Development, Packaging Supply Management System (VMI), Warehouse Management, and Transportation together to increase efficiency, reduce costs, and reduce redundancy in customers' operational processes.
vision.p3: Koch Packaging and Packing Services gives importance to developing In-house Engineering and Digital Systems to elevate accuracy, transparency, and the ability to control workflows in real-time, while focusing on sustainable growth alongside environmental and social responsibility.

service.dev_desc: Providing comprehensive packaging development and design services for the automotive industry, covering a wide range of materials such as paper, steel, wood, and plastic, with a focus on strong, safe designs suitable for transportation and storage. The company's packaging development process operates systematically, from conceptual design, prototyping, real-world testing, to final approval, all within a 7-day prototyping timeframe for fast and accurate customer response.
service.dev_sec1_desc: Full of experience and expertise, our team doesn't just produce standard packaging, but closely designs engineered solutions customized to the specific needs of each project.
service.dev_sec2_desc: Developing a Transportation Management System (TMS) with our own in-house team to ensure the system seamlessly aligns with the diverse requirements and needs of each customer.
service.dev_sec3_desc: Using world-class software like AutoCAD and SolidWorks 3D to create highly precise and complex packaging structures, followed by a Digital-Cutting Optimization System in material preparation to reduce waste and accelerate production.
service.wh_desc: Comprehensive warehouse management from receiving, storing, random checking, and distributing goods, using international standards to ensure your production process is uninterrupted.
service.wh_li1: Categorized and easily accessible storage system (Smart Storage)
service.wh_li2: Fast, correct, and accurate operations (Fast Operation)
service.wh_li4: Data integration with your supply chain system
service.wh_sec1_title: Categorized and Easily Accessible Storage System
service.wh_sec1_desc: Systematically designed storage space, clearly categorized by product type and frequency of use, allowing for fast retrieval, reducing errors, and maximizing warehouse space management efficiency.
service.wh_sec2_desc: Operating under clear standard procedures with support systems that reduce redundancy and errors, accelerating operations while continuously controlling quality and meeting customer demands on time.
service.wh_sec3_desc: Our team consists of trained professionals with direct experience in logistics and warehousing. They understand operational procedures in detail and can analyze problems and resolve situations professionally to ensure smooth and highly efficient operations.
service.trans_desc: Fast, punctual, and safe transportation services with our company's In-house Fleet, featuring a real-time tracking system.
service.trans_li2: Quality and safety control throughout the route
service.trans_li3: Supports the transportation of sensitive automotive parts
service.trans_li4: Works in alignment with the warehouse management system
service.trans_sec1_desc: Providing transportation services covering all regions and major industrial estates nationwide, efficiently planning routes to ensure on-time delivery, flexibly supporting both regular and urgent transportation needs.
service.trans_sec2_title: Quality and Safety Control Throughout the Route
service.trans_sec2_desc: Operating under safety and quality standards at every step, from receiving goods to storage and final delivery, with continuous tracking and status verification to reduce risks and build maximum confidence.
service.trans_sec3_title: Supports the Transportation of Sensitive Automotive Parts
service.trans_sec3_desc: Fully equipped to handle and transport parts requiring special care, using specialized equipment and standardized handling procedures to prevent damage during transit and preserve full product quality until it reaches the destination.
service.sup_desc: Elevating packaging management with a comprehensive Packaging Supply Management System that tracks accurately and reduces hidden costs in the production process.
service.sup_li4: Effectively reducing losses and missing packaging
service.sup_sec1_desc: Systematically tracking the circulation of reusable packaging from dispatch to use and return, reducing losses, increasing transparency, and efficiently controlling costs.
service.sup_sec2_desc: Controlling packaging inventory volume to suit actual workloads, checking real-time stock balances to reduce shortages or unnecessary overstocking.
service.sup_sec3_desc: Using operational data to analyze trends and performance for planning packaging allocations in line with workload volume, increasing decision-making accuracy and reducing long-term costs.

news_page.page_title: News and Events | Koch Packaging and Packing Services
news_page.songkran_title: Songkran Festival Activity for the Organization's Prosperity

news_detail.page_title: Songkran Festival Activity | Koch Packaging and Packing Services
news_detail.songkran_p1: On April 10, 2026, at 08:30 AM, Koch Packaging and Packing Services, led by Mr. Mongkol Raliew as the chairman of the ceremony, along with the executive team, led the employees to pay respect to Grandfather Sri Suttho, the sacred guardian of the company revered by Koch Packaging and Packing Services staff, to seek blessings for the continuous prosperity and success of the organization and its personnel in all missions.
news_detail.songkran_p2: After that, Mr. Mongkol honored the ceremony by leading the traditional bathing of the company's Buddha statue, with employees participating unitedly. The atmosphere was filled with warmth, joy, and auspiciousness. This activity was organized to preserve the beautiful Thai tradition and to strengthen the good relationships within the organization prior to the long Songkran holiday period.
